prestazioni: Engine: 7.0L Ford-based **Saleen-Code S7LM-V8** (all-aluminum, dry-sump, 4-valve DOHC) with billet crankshaft, forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 CR), and titanium connecting rods. Upgraded with a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ supercharger kit** (2.9L Eaton TVS2300 blower, 14 psi boost) and **V-band 3.5" stainless steel exhaust** with **Borla XR-1** race mufflers (straight-through, 304 stainless, 409-grade sound tuning).

Drivetrain: **Hewland NLT 6-speed sequential transaxle** with **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** (3.5" diameter, 1,200 Nm torque capacity) and **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (45% lockup). **Penske 8760 adjustable coilovers** (3-way damping, 2.5" monotube, 1,000 lb/in springs) with **Eibach ERS race springs** (front: 1,200 lb/in, rear: 1,500 lb/in) and **Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable dampers** (remote reservoirs, 20-click rebound/compression).

Aerodynamics & Cooling: **Saleen LM-spec carbon fiber underbody diffuser** (3-piece, 45-degree angle, 30% downforce increase at 180 mph) with **AIM Motorsport CFD-optimized front splitter** (adjustable 0-5 degrees, 20mm carbon D-tubes). **PWR USA dual-core aluminum radiator** (4.5" thick, 1,200 CFM cooling) with **SPAL 16" puller fans** (2,800 CFM each) and **Mocal 19-row oil cooler** (AN-12 fittings, 1,500 HP capacity).
estetica: Body: **Saleen LM Edition widebody kit** (pre-preg carbon fiber, 3.5" flares front/rear, 20mm extended wheel arches) with **Rocket Bunny V3-style side skirts** (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 15mm lower than OEM). **Seibon Carbon hood** (dual 3.5" NACA ducts, 50% weight reduction) and **Aeromotions active rear wing** (3-piece, 1,200mm span, 0-25 degree adjustability, carbon fiber).

Wheels & Brakes: **HRE P101SC wheels** (19x12" front, 20x13" rear, 3-piece forged, 9.5kg each) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (295/30/19 front, 345/30/20 rear, 200TW compound). **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers** (42mm pistons, monoblock aluminum) with **Carbon Lorraine CCM-R rotors** (420mm front, 380mm rear, 2-piece floating, 1,200°C heat tolerance).

Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses, 1.2kg each) with **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, Alcantara, quick-release hub). **AIM MXS Strada dash** (12.3" TFT, 1,000 Hz data logging) and **Weichers roll cage** (T45 steel, 3.5mm wall thickness, 8-point, FIA 8862-2018 certified).
